appSubtitle.message: Create site-specific passwords that become easy to remember over time.

whatIsText.message: KeyMaker generates deterministic passwords based on information you already know.

step3.message: Select the toggles to use different parts of the keyword or the entire keyword.

step5.message: Use the generated password on that website.

sameInputText.message: Using the same inputs will always generate the same password.

privacyText.message: All password generation happens locally in your browser. No information is sent to external servers.

supportText.message: KeyMaker is free, open-source and developed independently.
